title: Config
description:
Top-level configuration for an Assay project.

Loaded from `.assay/config.toml`.

provider.description:
AI provider configuration (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama).
Omit to use the default provider (Anthropic).

specs_dir.description:
Directory containing spec files, relative to `.assay/`.
Defaults to `"specs/"`.

default_timeout.description: Default timeout for gate commands in seconds. Defaults to 300.

evaluator_model.description: Default model for the evaluator subprocess. Defaults to `"sonnet"`.

evaluator_retries.description: Maximum retries for transient evaluator subprocess failures. Defaults to 1.

evaluator_timeout.description: Evaluator subprocess timeout in seconds. Defaults to 120.

max_history.description:
Maximum number of run history files to retain per spec.
When set, oldest files beyond this limit are pruned on each save.
A value of `0` means unlimited (no pruning). Defaults to `None` (no pruning).

GuardConfig.description:
Guard daemon configuration.

Controls thresholds, polling interval, and circuit breaker behavior
for the background context protection daemon.

hard_threshold.description: Hard threshold as percentage of context window (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.8.

hard_threshold_bytes.description: Hard threshold as file size in bytes. Optional, whichever fires first wins.

max_recoveries.description: Maximum recovery attempts before circuit breaker trips. Default: 3.

recovery_window_secs.description: Time window in seconds for counting recoveries. Default: 600 (10 minutes).

soft_threshold.description: Soft threshold as percentage of context window (0.0-1.0). Default: 0.6.

soft_threshold_bytes.description: Soft threshold as file size in bytes. Optional, whichever fires first wins.

ProviderConfig.description:
AI provider and model configuration.

All fields are optional and omitted from serialized output when absent.

execution_model.description: Model to use for execution tasks.

planning_model.description: Model to use for planning tasks (e.g. "claude-opus-4-5").

provider.description: Which AI provider to use. Defaults to Anthropic.

review_model.description: Model to use for review tasks.

stale_threshold_secs.description:
Staleness threshold in seconds for recovery sweep.
Sessions in the `AgentRunning` phase older than this are marked abandoned on startup.
Default: 3600 (1 hour). Must be greater than zero.

WorktreeConfig.description:
Configuration for worktree management.

Loaded from the `[worktree]` section of `.assay/config.toml`.

base_dir.description:
Base directory for worktrees.
Relative paths are resolved from the project root.
Default: `"../<project-name>-worktrees/"` (computed at runtime when empty).

Stored as `String` rather than `PathBuf` because this is a serialized config field
and changing the type would be a schema-breaking change.
